infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GigShield AI needs camera access to capture photo evidence for claim validation.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GigShield AI needs your location to verify you are in the disruption zone for claim validation.

plugins.cameraPermission: GigShield AI needs camera access to capture photo evidence for claim validation and anti-spoofing verification.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GigShield AI needs your GPS location to validate you were in the disruption zone. This helps speed up your payout.

plugins.photosPermission: GigShield AI needs access to save claim evidence photos to your device.
